product_overview: Relay is a credit-based, peer-to-peer marketplace for used tech where users discover, list, and swap devices via in-person meetups using in-app credits (Cr). The PRD pages (parsed pages 1-2) summarize core concepts and primary user flows: home/browse, search & filters, listing details, swap/messaging, and meetup completion.
core_goals: Enable local discovery and browsing of gadget listings with rich filters and listing detail views.
Provide a secure, email-based authentication and editable user profiles with avatars and privacy/settings controls.
Support a robust, multi-step listing creation and management experience including photo uploads, condition assessment, and pricing helpers.
Facilitate swaps between users with in-app messaging, pickup scheduling, live meetup location updates, and safe completion workflows.
Expose wallet and pricing tools (external lookups) to inform listing prices and manage credits/transactions.
Surface static safety, help, and guideline content to encourage safe meetups and provide user support.

features.name: Landing and Browse Marketplace
features.description: Home and category browse experience for discovering local gadget listings, searching, filtering (brand, condition, storage, price, distance), sorting, and viewing listing details.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See search bar and horizontal category nav -> Select category 'Phones' -> Navigate to /browse/[category] -> See grid of listings -> Type 'iPhone 12' into search bar -> Press Enter to search -> See filtered results -> Click listing card -> Navigate to /listing/[id] -> See listing details (condition, seller avatar/name, credits, city/state) -> Click heart icon to toggle wishlist -> See wishlist updated on profile

Navigate to /browse/[category] -> Click Filters -> Set brand and condition filters -> Set distance slider to 5 miles -> When prompted, deny browser location permission -> See message indicating location is required for distance filtering -> Try to sort by Nearest -> See 'Enable location' prompt or Nearest sorting disabled

features.name: Authentication and Profile
features.description: Email-based signup/login via Supabase, editable user profile with avatar, display name and settings for notifications, privacy, and account actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill email field -> Click Sign up -> See verification/confirmation prompt -> Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login -> Redirect to /profile -> Click Edit profile -> Update display name and bio -> Upload avatar image -> Click Save -> See updated profile on /profile
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field with incorrect password -> Click Login -> See authentication error message from Supabase -> Remain on /login
Navigate to /profile while logged out -> See prompt to log in -> Click login link -> Navigate to /login

features.name: Listing Creation and Management
features.description: Multi-step listing flow for creating, editing, and managing device listings (device selection, condition assessment, photos, pricing helpers, and publishing).
user_flows: Navigate to /list -> See listing multi-step layout -> Select device model -> Fill title field -> Fill description field -> Upload photos -> Click Next -> Select condition -> Enter price (credits) -> Click Use pricing helper -> Receive recommended price from pricing service -> Click Publish -> Client sends POST to /api/device-listings -> Navigate to /listing/[id] -> See newly published listing

Navigate to /list -> Fill title field but leave price empty -> Click Publish -> Receive validation error from POST /api/device-listings (400) -> See inline validation message and remain on same form step
Navigate to /list -> Upload photos -> Photo upload fails due to storage error -> See upload error message -> Remain on photo step and allow retry

features.name: Swaps, Messaging, and Meetups
features.description: Start and manage swaps between users from a listing, use in-app messaging tied to the swap, propose/accept pickup slots, coordinate meetups with live location updates and get directions to chosen meetup spots.
user_flows: Navigate to /listing/[id] -> Click Start Swap -> System creates swap and redirects to /messages/[swapId] -> Type message in thread -> Click Send -> See message appear in thread -> Click Propose pickup slot -> Select date/time and meetup location -> Submit pickup proposal -> Other user accepts proposal -> Navigate to /meetup/[swapId] -> See pickup time, stage, and location -> Click Get directions -> External maps open to meetup location
Navigate to /messages/[swapId] -> Type message -> Click Send while offline -> See send failure/error toast -> Click Retry -> Message is sent successfully
Navigate to /swaps while logged out -> See prompt to log in -> Click login link -> Navigate to /login

features.name: Wallet, Credits, and Pricing
features.description: User wallet showing credits and transactions, pricing lookup helpers backed by external services (Swappa, PriceCharting) to inform valuations when listing or browsing items.
user_flows: Navigate to /pricing -> Enter device query -> Click Swappa price lookup -> Client calls /api/credits/swappa-lookup -> Receive price lookup result -> Use recommended price to set listing price in /list flow -> See suggested price populated in price field
Navigate to /pricing -> Enter device query -> Click PriceCharting lookup -> External API call fails -> Receive error message 'Price lookup failed' -> Allow manual price entry as fallback
Navigate to /wallet -> See credits balance retrieved from GET /rest/v1/transactions -> See recent transactions list

features.name: Safety, Help, and Static Content
features.description: Static informational pages for safety guidelines, help center, about, and the More menu to surface support and policy content to users.
user_flows: Navigate to /safety -> Read safety guidelines content (static) -> Click link to /guidelines for more detail -> Return to /more
Navigate to /help -> Click 'Contact support' -> Fill support form -> Click Submit -> Network error occurs -> See submission error message and ability to retry
Navigate to /about -> See static about page content

features.name: Landing and Browse Marketplace
features.description: Landing page and browse flows for discovering local gadget listings, filtering by category, condition, distance, price, and brand, and viewing individual listing details.

endpoints.description: Fetch general gadget catalog with filters
Fetch live marketplace listings for gadgets

features.name: Listing Creation and Management

Update live meetup location for a swap

features.name: Wallet, Credits, and Pricing
features.description: User wallet and credits balance, pricing helpers backed by external providers (Swappa, PriceCharting, etc.), and credits flows tied to swaps and listings.

endpoints.description: Look up resale pricing for specific devices from Swappa
Look up retro game pricing via PriceCharting
Fetch wallet transactions and credits balance

features.name: Safety, Help, and Static Content
features.description: Static informational pages for safety, help center, guidelines, about, and more menu that ties navigation together on mobile.

endpoints.description: Static about page rendered by Next.js

known_limitations.issue: Many API route handlers rely on Supabase row-level security and do limited explicit input validation.
known_limitations.impact: Bad inputs may surface as generic 400/500 errors rather than user-friendly validation messages.

known_limitations.issue: Some flows assume the user is logged in but do not always handle anonymous states gracefully.
known_limitations.impact: Anonymous users may see loading states without clear prompts to log in.
